description: Declares dependency pointers (DIDs or hostnames) published by a steward DID. Hostnames can be resolved to DIDs via DNS _atproto; clients may then fetch fund.at.* records from those DIDs.

main.description: List of dependency identifiers (DIDs or hostnames). Optionally scoped with restrictToDomains and/or appliesToNsidPrefix.

restrictToDomains.description: Optional allowlist of domain/hostnames for which this record applies (e.g. example.com, pds.example.com). When omitted or empty, the record is open.

appliesToNsidPrefix.description: Optional NSID prefix this dependency list applies to (e.g. app.bsky.). When omitted, the record applies generally (subject to restrictToDomains). Host-only clients typically ignore NSID-scoped records.

uris.description: Dependency identifiers. Each entry must be either a DID (did:plc:… / did:web:…) or a hostname (example.com, pds.example.com).

notes.description: Optional human-readable context for indexers or maintainers.
